query:
SELECT u.name, u.email, u.role, eds.digest_type, eds.status, eds.week_key, eds.item_count, eds.sent_at
FROM email_digest_send_slots eds
JOIN users u ON u.id = eds.user_id
WHERE eds.digest_type = 'thursday'
ORDER BY eds.sent_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
